nodes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
nodes.description: name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Wrap | short_description: Stuffed bell peppers filled with lean turkey, rice, and tomato sauce, topped with cheddar and baked until peppers are tender. | mea
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Wrap - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Wrap | short_description: Stuffed bell peppers filled with lean turkey, rice, and tomato sauce, topped with cheddar and baked until peppers are tender. | meal_suggestion: For a lighter version, use brown rice and a smaller amount of cheese; pair with steamed greens or a side salad to boost fiber and micronutrients. You can batch-cook and refrigerate for quick meals. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich stuffed peppers feature lean ground turkey, carbohydrates from rice, and calcium from cheddar. Peppers add fiber and vitamin C; using low-sodium tomato sauce and modest cheese helps manage sodium and saturated fat.

nodes.name: Baked Salmon Plate — Mild-Spice Skillet
nodes.description: name: Baked Salmon Plate — Mild-Spice Skillet | short_description: Baked salmon with mild spices, lemon, mixed vegetables, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 4–6 oz salmon, 1 cup cooked rice,
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Baked Salmon Plate — Mild-Spice Skillet - name: Baked Salmon Plate — Mild-Spice Skillet | short_description: Baked salmon with mild spices, lemon, mixed vegetables, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 4–6 oz salmon, 1 cup cooked rice, 1–2 cups mixed vegetables; drizzle with lemon juice and a touch of olive oil or herbs. For more fiber, swap white rice for brown rice or quinoa. | nutrition_note: High-protein, omega-3-rich salmon; moderate carbs from rice; fiber and micronutrients from mixed vegetables; lemon adds vitamin C. Overall balanced and heart-healthy; suitable for portion-controlled dinners. Use minimal added salt if using spice blends.

nodes.name: Chicken Stir-Fry — Berry Boost Style
nodes.description: name: Chicken Stir-Fry — Berry Boost Style | short_description: Chicken stir-fry with mixed vegetables and brown rice in a light garlic-soy glaze. Berry Boost styling can be achieved by incorporating
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Chicken Stir-Fry — Berry Boost Style - name: Chicken Stir-Fry — Berry Boost Style | short_description: Chicken stir-fry with mixed vegetables and brown rice in a light garlic-soy glaze. Berry Boost styling can be achieved by incorporating berries as a fresh or saucy accompaniment. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side of berries (e.g., blueberries or strawberries) or drizzle a berry sauce to honor the Berry Boost concept, while keeping the core protein, veggies, and brown rice for balanced nutrition. | nutrition_note: Lean chicken provides high-quality protein. Brown rice and mixed vegetables supply fiber and essential nutrients; garlic adds flavor and potential immune-supporting properties. Soy sauce contributes sodium, so consider a low-sodium version to keep salt in check. The Berry Boost concept isn’t reflected by the listed ingredients—adding fresh or frozen berries on the side or in a berry-based sauce can boost antioxidants.
